rationale: The score moved 5→6 but both evaluations rest entirely on the same job-relevant gap: lack of explicit experimentation/A-B-testing/feature-flagging experience for a Principal-level experimentation role. The variant's added detail (14+ years, 'Staff Software Engineer', open-source contributions, bias detection/rollout risk) is ordinary reworded elaboration of identical resume content and never references location, nationality, or origin. The one-point difference is within normal run-to-run noise, and nothing in the variant keys off the Berlin→São Paulo change.
